title: My Backpack Is Too Heavy
lyrics:
[verse]
My backpack weighs a thousand pounds
I packed it up last night
There's books and pens and water bottles
Nothing fits just right

[chorus]
My backpack is too heavy
I can barely walk to school
My backpack is too heavy
But I'm not taking anything out

[verse]
There's a rock I found at recess
And a wrapper from my snack
A toy I need for no good reason
Shoved into the back

[chorus]
My backpack is too heavy
I can barely walk to school
My backpack is too heavy
But I'm not taking anything out

[verse]
The zipper doesn't close now
One strap is hanging low
My teacher says to clean it out
I smile and I say no

[chorus]
My backpack is too heavy
I can barely walk to school
My backpack is too heavy
But I'm not taking anything out
style_prompt: Super bouncy children's song, guitar and snappy drums, 118 BPM, punchy beat clapping on 2 and 4, bass bounces bup-bup-bup, feel it in your chest, kids start dancing without deciding to, fun physical impossible not to move
cover_description: A child leaning backwards from the weight of an enormous overstuffed backpack, a toy dinosaur and candy wrappers spilling out the top, a rock visible in the side pocket, school hallway background, funny and exaggerated
